_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of current test standards and safety standards that are applicable to software development.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of compliance assessment methodologies, including control testing, evidence gathering, gap analysis, and findings documentation standards.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-008 (RM, cosine: 0.554), DQ-K-018 (DQ, cosine: 0.540).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.2/10 (raw 0.418). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, standards]. DCWF-only terms [applicable, current, development, safety, software, test] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, assessment, compliance, control, documentation, evidence] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.890 (P=0.903, R=0.877). P exceeds R by 0.026 — the DCWF element's 14 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 16 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.2%, N:63.9%, C:35.9%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of current test standards and safety standards that are applicable to" vs "Knowledge of compliance assessment methodologies, including control testing, evi" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.589 > STS 0.418 (gap +0.170). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, standards] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, standards]. DCWF-only: [applicable, current, development, safety, software, test]. WIDAI-only: [analysis, assessment, compliance, control, documentation, evidence].
